discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported 62.5% and model 62.5% (5/8 MPNST-G2 samples with 9p loss at threshold -0.10) are an exact match (0% relative difference), well within the +/-10% concordance threshold. Python CONUMEE-substitute analysis successfully reproduced the paper's 9p loss frequency for MPNST-G2.
